athletes.name: [Founder Name]
athletes.quote: I built PURIST because I saw businesses drowning in manual tasks they could automate in a weekend. We answered to the results first, the tech stack second.

athletes.name: [Dental Practice Owner]
athletes.quote: We cut front-desk call time by 60%. Patients book online, get reminders automatically, and insurance verification runs itself. PURIST changed our operations.

athletes.name: [Property Manager]
athletes.quote: Tenant inquiries, maintenance requests, lease renewals — everything that used to be spreadsheets and sticky notes now runs on autopilot.

athletes.name: [Agency Founder]
athletes.quote: Reporting used to take 2 days every month. Now it takes 2 minutes. My team focuses on strategy instead of copying data between tabs.

athletes.name: [SaaS COO]
athletes.quote: I evaluate automation tools for a living. PURIST is one of the very few agencies I recommend to peers and use myself.

athletes.name: [Law Firm Partner]
athletes.quote: I spent a decade patching together tools. This is the simplest, most reliable operations system I have used.

athletes.name: [E-commerce Director]
athletes.quote: At our scale, a missed order or delayed response costs real money. PURIST is the backend I do not have to worry about.

athletes.name: [Staffing Agency CEO]
athletes.quote: Candidate screening used to burn 30 hours a week. Anything we automate has to earn its place. PURIST earned it.
